title: Attack attack
description: Another person died in the Dnipro hospital, wounded due to the Russian attack on the city. As the head of the Dnipropetrovsk OVA reported, unfortunately, the doctors could not save the 60-year-old man. His ego injuries turned out to be too severe. At the moment, the enemy's night attack on the Dnieper has already claimed 7 lives, 35 people have been wounded, 4 are in serious condition. Fifty houses were damaged. More than 2 thousand windows were broken.
description_en: Another person died in the Dnipro hospital, wounded due to the Russian attack on the city. As the head of the Dnipropetrovsk OVA reported, unfortunately, the doctors could not save the 60-year-old man. His ego injuries turned out to be too severe. At the moment, the enemy's night attack on the Dnieper has already claimed 7 lives, 35 people have been wounded, 4 are in serious condition. Fifty houses were damaged. More than 2 thousand windows were broken.
description_uk: В больнице Днепра умер еще один человек, раненный из-за российской атаки на город Как сообщил глава Днепропетровской ОВА, к сожалению, медикам не удалось спасти 60-летнего мужчину. Его травмы оказались слишком тяжелыми. На данный момент ночная вражеская атака на Днепр унесла уже 7 жизней, 35 человек получили ранения, 4 – в тяжелом состоянии. Повреждены полсотни домов. Разбито более 2 тысяч окон.

title: Kyiv: Airstrike attack
description: Three people injured, houses damaged and fires erupt following Russian attack on Kyiv Oblast – photos Heavy overnight bombardment targeting multiple districts damaged houses, warehouses and cars, triggering several fires across Kyiv Oblast. Read the full article on our website

title: 73 missiles + 656 drones intercepted
description: The Air Force reports that 73 missiles and 656 drones of various types attacked Ukraine last night, of which 40 missiles and 602 UAVs were shot down ❗️ The main direction of the attack is Kyiv. Dnipro, Kharkiv, Zaporozhye, Poltava and other regions were also attacked. A total of 729 means of air attack were recorded by the Air Force's radio engineering forces: - 8 anti-ship missiles 3M22 "Zircon" (areas...
description_en: The Air Force reports that 73 missiles and 656 drones of various types attacked Ukraine last night, of which 40 missiles and 602 UAVs were shot down ❗️ The main direction of the attack is Kyiv. Dnipro, Kharkiv, Zaporozhye, Poltava and other regions were also attacked. A total of 729 means of air attack were recorded by the Air Force's radio engineering forces: - 8 anti-ship missiles 3M22 "Zircon" (areas...
description_uk: Воздушные силы сообщают, что сегодня ночью Украину атаковали 73 ракеты и 656 дронов различного типа, из которых было сбито 40 ракет и 602 БПЛА ❗️ Основное направление удара – Киев. Также атакованы Днепр, Харьков, Запорожье, Полтавщину и другие регионы. Всего радиотехническими войсками Воздушных Сил зафиксировано 729 средств воздушного нападения: - 8 противокорабельных ракет 3М22 "Циркон" (районы...

title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Update: Explosions again heard in Kyiv amid ongoing large-scale attack. Several explosions were again heard in Kyiv around 7:20 a.m. local time, according to Kyiv Independent journalists on the ground. Ukraine's Air Force warned of another potential wave of ballistic missile strikes as Russia's large-scale attack on the capital continues.
description_en: Update: Explosions again heard in Kyiv amid ongoing large-scale attack. Several explosions were again heard in Kyiv around 7:20 a.m. local time, according to Kyiv Independent journalists on the ground. Ukraine's Air Force warned of another potential wave of ballistic missile strikes as Russia's large-scale attack on the capital continues.

title: Dnipro: 9 killed, 89 injured

title: Kyiv: 4 injured
description: At least 4 injured in large-scale missile, drone attack on Kyiv. At least four people have suffered injuries in a large-scale missile and drone attack on Kyiv overnight on June 2, officials reported. Residents of Kyiv have been bracing for another attack for days following intelligence reports that Moscow was preparing another strike on the capital

title: 32 missiles
description: The monitoring public reports several bad signals at once on this night. The activity of the strategic aviation control points of the Russian Federation is recorded (it's a pity that Pautina did not finish all of them). It is also reported about the increased threat of using Kh-22/Kh-32 missiles from Tu-22M3 onboard. Our common task with you is to take care of your safety.
description_en: The monitoring public reports several bad signals at once on this night. The activity of the strategic aviation control points of the Russian Federation is recorded (it's a pity that Pautina did not finish all of them). It is also reported about the increased threat of using Kh-22/Kh-32 missiles from Tu-22M3 onboard. Our common task with you is to take care of your safety.
description_uk: Мониторинговые паблики сообщают сразу несколько плохих сигналов на эту ночь Зафиксирована активность пунктов управления стратегической авиации рф (как жаль, что «Паутина» добила не всю). Также сообщается о повышенной угрозе применения ракет Х-22/Х-32 с бортов Ту-22М3. Наша общая с вами задача — позаботиться о своей безопасности.

title: Missile launch detected
description: Russian Federation cannot afford to launch "Iskander" every day, - "Flash" According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergei Beskrestnov, the Russians produce about 60 "Iskander-M" missiles a month, and this is not enough for daily massive strikes. Moreover, the Russian Federation uses missiles not only against Kiev, but also for targets along the entire front line: "If our limit is related to the number of missiles for...

Тем более, что ракеты рф использует не только против Киева, но и по целям вдоль всей линии фронта: «Если у нас лимит связан с количеством ракет для...
